title: phyllanthus pseudocicca
intro: Phyllanthus pseudocicca, also known as the spurge or nettle-leaf tree, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pseudocicca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and enhance immune response. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus pseudocicca include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
